TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Emomali Rahmon ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 10, Emomali Rahmon, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Tajikistan ta' misuw hya' ga Emomali Rahmon, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 1994 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: emomali rańßmon rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, emomali rańßmon, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw tajikis~…ētan ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a emomali rańßmon, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
S.FORM: Emomali Rahmon ryax sa tay 5 nqu tay 10, Emomali Rahmon, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1952) mrhuw Tajikistan ta' misuw hya' ga Emomali Rahmon, aring ryax tay 16 squ byacing tay 11 sa kawas 1994 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: emomali rańßmon rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, emomali rańßmon, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw tajikis~…ētan ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a emomali rańßmon, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj ** s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
